subject: fix(review): address code review findings — UX, error handling, deletion
body:
Fixes from the `review` trigger sweep:

- Kebab menu hint auto-dismisses after 6s instead of pulsing forever
- Pull-to-refresh shows visual progress bar + color change at threshold
- Import wizard shows transaction count when reviewing (pagination depth)
- Import upload gives specific error for empty files vs missing data rows
- ML model composables expose retryModel() for download failure recovery
- Import review shows "Retry download" button when models fail to load
- Tag autocomplete shows "No matching tags — press Enter to create" hint
- Transaction deletion: delete button in edit modal, wired through table
  to dashboard with DB cleanup and optimistic local state update
- Kebab hint timer cleaned up on unmount (prevents leak)

Tags: ux, review, ml, import, transactions
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-sweep
Semver: minor
title: address code review findings — UX, error handling, deletion
